title: pleurothallis neobradei
intro: Pleurothallis neobradei is a species of orchid, commonly found in the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Pleurothallis neobradei include its ability to alleviate coughs, reduce fever, and soothe irritated throats. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the roots in water or using them to create a decoction, which can be used as a natural remedy for respiratory issues.
